Project.title: Project
Project.description: A construction site project containing 3D models and drawings

projectName.description: The name of the construction project

createdBy.description: UID of the admin who created the project

description.description: A short description of the project

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the project was created

Drawing.title: Drawing
Drawing.description: A 2D drawing (blueprint/photo) uploaded to a project

fileName.description: Original file name of the drawing

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the drawing was uploaded

Mark.title: Mark
Mark.description: An interactive geometric observation mark on a drawing

type.description: The geometric shape of the mark

label.description: Text label or title of the observation

createdBy.description: UID of the user who created the mark

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the mark was created

evidencePhotos.description: A list of evidence photos linked to this mark

Model.title: Model
Model.description: A 3D GLB model uploaded to a project

fileName.description: Original file name of the GLB model

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the model was uploaded

Member.title: Member
Member.description: A project member with specific access rights

role.description: Access level of the project member

ShareLink.title: ShareLink
ShareLink.description: A shareable public link with specific access level

token.description: Unique secure token for URL lookup

accessLevel.description: Whether the share link is view-only or allows mark creation

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the share link was created

expiresAt.description: Optional expiration date for the link

createdBy.description: UID of the admin who generated the share link

/projects/{projectId}/drawings/{drawingI.description: Drawings uploaded to a specific project
Geometric markings added to a specific project drawing

/projects/{projectId}/models/{modelId}.description: 3D GLB models uploaded to a specific project

/projects/{projectId}/members/{memberUid.description: Members assigned to a project and their permission role

/shareLinks/{shareLinkId}.description: Public shareable link tokens and details
